service.name: Resource Service
service.description: Multi-cloud compute resource allocation and management service

permissions.name: Create Allocations
permissions.description: Allows user to allocate new compute resources
permissions.intent: Users need this permission to provision new compute resources. Each allocation consumes cloud resources and incurs costs.

permissions.name: Create Deployments
permissions.description: Allows user to create new deployments (EC2, Fargate, Lambda, etc.)
permissions.intent: Users need this to deploy resources via various engines.

permissions.name: Read All Resources
permissions.description: Allows user to view their own resource allocations, instances, and status
permissions.intent: Basic read access to resource information. Required for dashboard access.

permissions.name: Modify Resources
permissions.description: Allows user to start, stop, and modify their own resources
permissions.intent: Enables resource lifecycle management (start/stop). Stopping resources reduces costs.

permissions.name: Scale Resources
permissions.description: Allows user to scale their resource allocations up or down
permissions.intent: Enables adjusting resource capacity. Scaling affects costs.

permissions.name: Delete Resources
permissions.description: Allows user to permanently terminate their own resource allocations
permissions.intent: Enables permanent removal of compute resources. Termination is irreversible.
permissions.security_notes: Termination stops billing but data cannot be recovered.

permissions.name: Execute in Instances
permissions.description: Allows user to execute commands within their allocated compute environments
permissions.intent: Enables running arbitrary commands inside containers/VMs.
permissions.security_notes: Commands are isolated within allocated container/VM.

permissions.name: Execute in Containers
permissions.description: Allows user to execute commands within containers
permissions.intent: Enables running commands inside containers.

permissions.name: SSH Access
permissions.description: Allows user to SSH or console into their compute instances
permissions.intent: Enables direct shell access to VMs and containers for debugging.
permissions.security_notes: SSH access is logged. Consider using execute for non-interactive commands.

permissions.name: View Logs
permissions.description: Allows user to view logs from their compute resources
permissions.intent: Enables viewing container logs, system logs, and application output.

permissions.name: View Metrics
permissions.description: Allows user to view metrics and monitoring data from their resources
permissions.intent: Enables viewing CPU, memory, network, and custom metrics.

permissions.name: Read Costs
permissions.description: Allows user to view their own cost reports and usage statistics
permissions.intent: Enables users to monitor their personal spending and resource usage.

permissions.name: Cost Administrator
permissions.description: Full administrative access to organization-wide cost data and budgets
permissions.intent: Org-level billing admin. View all user costs, set budgets, access org-wide reports.

permissions.name: Read Quotas
permissions.description: Allows user to view their own quota limits and usage
permissions.intent: Enables users to see their resource limits and current usage.

permissions.name: Quota Administrator
permissions.description: Allows management of quota limits for organization users
permissions.intent: Org-level quota admin. Set and modify resource quotas for users.

permissions.name: Read Workflows
permissions.description: Allows user to view workflow definitions
permissions.intent: Enables viewing deployment workflow configurations.

permissions.name: Create Workflows
permissions.description: Allows user to create and upload deployment workflow definitions
permissions.intent: Enables creating reusable deployment configurations.

permissions.name: Execute Workflows
permissions.description: Allows user to execute deployment workflows
permissions.intent: Enables running workflow-based deployments.
permissions.security_notes: Workflow execution may provision resources and incur costs.

permissions.name: Resource Administrator
permissions.description: Full administrative access to all resources within the organization
permissions.intent: Org-level admin. View, modify, start, stop, scale, delete ANY resource in the org.
permissions.security_notes: Admins can access all org resources but not other organizations.

permissions.name: Read Platform Config
permissions.description: Allows viewing platform configuration
permissions.intent: Platform-level config access for ab0t staff.

permissions.name: Platform Administrator
permissions.description: Platform-wide administrative access
permissions.intent: Platform-level admin for ab0t staff. View system health, manage configurations.
permissions.security_notes: Platform admins need cross_tenant for cross-org resource access.

permissions.name: Cross-Tenant Access
permissions.description: Allows access to resources across organization boundaries
permissions.intent: Emergency support permission. Access resources in ANY organization.
permissions.security_notes: All cross-tenant access is logged and audited. Grant only to senior support staff.

roles.name: Resource User
roles.description: Standard user with full access to their own resources

roles.name: Resource Viewer
roles.description: Read-only access to resources (e.g., for auditors)

roles.name: Resource Operator
roles.description: Can manage resources but not create new ones

roles.name: Resource Administrator
roles.description: Full admin access to all org resources and costs

roles.name: Platform Administrator
roles.description: Platform-wide admin with cross-tenant access (ab0t staff only)

multi_tenancy.notes: Users can only access resources within their own organization. Cross-tenant access requires resource.cross_tenant and is fully audited.
